generated_oml:
instance IndoorAirQualitySensors : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Raspberry Pi equipped with sensors for indoor air quality monitoring"
    DTDFVocab:producedData IndoorAirQualityData
]

instance GantryCraneStateSensors : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensors on the lab-scale gantry crane system for state data collection"
    DTDFVocab:producedData CraneStateData
]

instance IndoorAirQualityData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom IndoorAirQualitySensors
]

instance CraneStateData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom GantryCraneStateSensors
]

instance IndoorAirQualityDataStorage : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Indoor air quality sensor data stored in InfluxDB"
    DTDFVocab:fromData IndoorAirQualityData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo InfluxDB
]

instance CraneStateDataStorage : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Crane state data stored in TimescaleDB"
    DTDFVocab:fromData CraneStateData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDB
]

instance InfluxDB : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Time-series database for indoor air quality data storage"
    DTDFVocab:enables HistoricalDataLoggingService
]

instance ActiveMQ : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Message brokering for data transmission between components"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataVisualizationService, HistoricalDataLoggingService, ContinuousValidationService
]

instance TimescaleDB : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Time-series database for crane state data logging"
    DTDFVocab:enables HistoricalDataLoggingService
]

instance AzureCloudServices : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Microsoft Azure cloud services for digital twin data pipeline"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataVisualizationService, ScenarioAnalysisSimulationService, VirusSpreadPredictionService, OptimalControlService, ContinuousValidationService
]

instance AutomationMLAirQualityModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "AutomationML-based digital twin model for indoor air quality management using Microsoft Azure tools"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo AzureCloudServices
]

instance HistoricalDataLoggingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for historical data logging and analysis"
    DTDFVocab:provides HistoricalDataInsight
]

instance DataVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for runtime visualization of air quality data"
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeMonitoringInsight
]

instance ScenarioAnalysisSimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for simulation-based scenario analysis"
    DTDFVocab:provides ScenarioAnalysisInsight
]

instance VirusSpreadPredictionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for predicting virus spread using air quality data"
    DTDFVocab:provides VirusSpreadPredictionInsight
]

instance ContinuousValidationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for continuous validation of system integrity"
    DTDFVocab:provides SystemIntegrityInsight
]

instance OptimalControlService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for optimal control of the system"
    DTDFVocab:provides OptimalControlInsight
]

instance HistoricalDataInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Historical data analysis for system performance monitoring"
]

instance RealTimeMonitoringInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Runtime visualization for real-time air quality monitoring"
]

instance ScenarioAnalysisInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Simulation-based scenario analysis for air quality management"
]

instance VirusSpreadPredictionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Prediction capabilities for virus spread prevention using air quality data"
]

instance SystemIntegrityInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "System integrity validation through continuous monitoring"
]

instance OptimalControlInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Optimal control recommendations for system adjustments"
]

instance LabGantryCraneSystem : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Lab-scale gantry crane system with physical components for research and educational applications"
    base:contains GantryCrane, CraneController, IndoorAirQualitySensors, GantryCraneStateSensors
]

instance GantryCrane : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Physical gantry crane component"
]

instance CraneController : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Controller for the lab-scale gantry crane system"
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "The Control Application (Python) sends control commands through the Physical Crane Interface to the Physical Crane for execution."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "An MQTT broker is utilized for signaling between services in the digital twin system."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "The Air Quality Management exemplar integrates with Microsoft Azure services for digital twin pipeline implementation and utilizes AutomationML as an interoperability standard for model exchange. GreenhouseDT employs ActiveMQ for message brokering and InfluxDB for time-series data storage, though specific external system integrations beyond internal components are not detailed in the documents."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "AutomationML (Automation Markup Language) is used for structuring the digital twin in the Air Quality Management exemplar, adhering to industrial automation data exchange standards. The C4 Model is applied for standardized software architecture visualization. No additional industry certifications or interoperability standards beyond these are specified."
]
